_PostToTag_insert_author_or_admin.name: _PostToTag_insert_author_or_admin
_PostToTag_insert_author_or_admin.withCheck:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM posts
        WHERE posts.id = "A"
        AND (posts."authorId" = auth.uid()::text OR current_user_is_admin())
      )

_PostToTag_delete_author_or_admin.name: _PostToTag_delete_author_or_admin
_PostToTag_delete_author_or_admin.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM posts
        WHERE posts.id = "A"
        AND (posts."authorId" = auth.uid()::text OR current_user_is_admin())
      )
